calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2015 Set For Trial On Jun-13-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Business Records Subpoena To Titan Management And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And Their Counsel Of Record
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lucas Olona of Berding & Weil LLP telephone number 925-838-2090 for Plaintiff.
Lisa Schlittner of Lorber, Greenfield & Polito LLP telephone number 415-986-8600 for Defendants.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, PLAINTIFF SYMPHONY TOWERS OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Quash Business Records Subpoena To Titan Management And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And Their Counsel Of Record is granted in part and denied in part. Counsel for the Defendant is to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
